name: Tuna Fish Sauce for Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, sweat the onion and garlic until translucent.
2. Add the anchovies and tuna (including the oil) to the pan. Stir until a paste forms.
3. Add the tomato sauce and mix well with one package of cooked spaghetti.
Notes: Italian-style tuna fish in olive oil is preferred (we use Pastene brand). The tomato sauce comes from a small can, such as Hunt's, approximately 1/2 cup.
